allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(l.get\('textPayload',''\)\) for l in logs if l.get\('textPayload'\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; b=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(b.get\('logUrl','no url'\)\); print\('status:', b.get\('status'\)\); steps=b.get\('steps',[]\); [print\(f'Step {i}: {s.get\(\\"name\\",\\"\\"\)} - {s.get\(\\"status\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) for i,s in enumerate\(steps\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); steps=d.get\('steps',[]\); [print\(f'Step {i}: {s.get\(\\"name\\",\\"\\"\)} status={s.get\(\\"status\\",\\"\\"\)}\\\\n  args={s.get\(\\"args\\",[]\)}\\\\n  timing={s.get\(\\"timing\\",{}\)}'\) for i,s in enumerate\(steps\)]; print\('\\\\nBuild status:', d.get\('status'\)\); print\('Failure:', d.get\('failureInfo'\)\); print\('Logs:', d.get\('logUrl'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Steps count:', len\(d.get\('steps',[]\)\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2, default=str\)\)")
